description: Initial reviewed Open Targets spot-lookup seed. These mappings are accepted for context-only import; they are not professional clinical evidence review.

substances.note: Accepted parent-molecule context mapping; not a professional clinical evidence review.
substances.identityReviewRationale: Diognosis Paroxetine refers to the active parent molecule; Open Targets CHEMBL490 is the matching parent molecule. Salt and brand entities are intentionally not used for context import.

substances.note: Accepted parent-molecule context mapping; salts remain out of scope.
substances.identityReviewRationale: Diognosis Codeine refers to the active parent molecule; Open Targets CHEMBL485 is the matching parent molecule. Codeine phosphate and sulfate remain separate salt entities and are not imported.
Diognosis Simvastatin refers to the active drug entity; Open Targets CHEMBL1064 is the matching molecule used for context import.
Diognosis Clarithromycin refers to the parent molecule; Open Targets CHEMBL1741 is the matching molecule used for context import.
Diognosis Capecitabine refers to the parent prodrug molecule; Open Targets CHEMBL1773 is the matching molecule used for context import.
Diognosis Clozapine refers to the parent molecule; Open Targets CHEMBL42 is the matching molecule used for context import.

substances.note: Accepted parent-molecule context mapping; salt entities remain out of scope.
substances.identityReviewRationale: Diognosis Warfarin refers to the parent molecule; Open Targets CHEMBL1464 is the matching parent. Sodium and potassium salt entities remain out of scope.

substances.note: Accepted parent-molecule context mapping; sulfate salt remains out of scope.
substances.identityReviewRationale: Diognosis Abacavir refers to the parent molecule; Open Targets CHEMBL1380 is the matching parent. Abacavir sulfate remains out of scope.

substances.note: Accepted parent-molecule context mapping; bisulfate salt remains out of scope.
substances.identityReviewRationale: Diognosis Clopidogrel refers to the parent prodrug molecule; Open Targets CHEMBL1771 is the matching parent. Bisulfate and other salt entities remain out of scope.

substances.note: Accepted parent-molecule context mapping; citrate salt remains out of scope.
substances.identityReviewRationale: Diognosis Tamoxifen refers to the parent molecule; Open Targets CHEMBL83 is the matching parent. Tamoxifen citrate remains out of scope.
